chapter_question: How does the derivative of the normal field become a linear operator?
inspection_targets: The tangent unit circle maps to an ellipse of normal derivatives.
Normal drift over a patch defines a tangent-plane map.
Zero normal curvature directions appear only with mixed signs.
The first, second, and third forms package metric and bending data.

source_span.focus: Packages surface bending into the shape operator and connects its matrix, eigenstructure, and classical fundamental forms.
source_span.label: Chapter 15
source_span.title: The Shape Operator
topics: Geometric action of the operator on tangent vectors
Singular value decomposition and transpose detour
Matrix representation of the shape operator
First, second, and third fundamental forms
